title: Azure Event Hubs Consumer Group
description: A consumer group is a view (state, position, or offset) of an entire event hub. Consumer groups enable multiple consuming applications to each have a separate view of the event stream, and to read the stream independently at their own pace and with their own offsets. A default consumer group ($Default) is automatically created for each event hub.

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource.

name.description: The name of the consumer group.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives.

createdAt.description: Exact time the consumer group was created.

updatedAt.description: The exact time the consumer group was last updated.

userMetadata.description: User Metadata is a placeholder to store user-defined string data with maximum length 1024. It can be used to store descriptive data, such as list of teams and their contact information, or user-defined configuration settings.

systemData.description: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.
